final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input direction,
  input load,
  input [3:0] data,
  output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    if (reset) begin
      count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (load) begin
      count <= data;
    end else begin
      if (direction) begin
        if (count == 4'b1111) begin
          count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
          count <= count + 1;
        end
      end else begin
        if (count == 4'b0000) begin
          count <= 4'b1111;
        end else begin
          count <= count - 1;
        end
      end
    end
  end
  
endmodule
